But considering the information I found, here's a paragraph about Allium altaicum (Garlic plant).

Allium altaicum, commonly known as Garlic plant, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Allium genus and is native to mountainous regions. The health benefits of Allium altaicum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Allium altaicum include sulfur compounds, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Allium altaicum include garlic oil, garlic extract, and garlic capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions.
